__NOINDEX__
{{CargoRelicResonance
|relics=Isabella I Portrait,Catherine II Portrait,Mysterious Relic,Alfred Statue,Washington Portrait,Mysterious Relic
|rank=orange
|amount=6
|category=minion
|description=All minion skins RUSH +120%
}}
[[Category:Minion]]
[[Category:Minion RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Minion Skin Boost]]
